TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Smebuc, title = Smebuc, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Smebuc} }

S.FORM: = Smebuc = Smebuc ku pako qwarux, yasa sluun ku toka rawa.
S.PHON: = sməbuʦ = sməbuʦ ku pako qwaɾux, jasa sluun ku toka ɾawa.
S.FORM: = Smebuc = Smebuc ku pako qwarux, yasa sluun ku toka rawa.
S.PHON: = sməbuʦ = sməbuʦ ku pako qwaɾux, jasa sluun ku toka ɾawa.
